MADE FOR ROYALTY

About RAMBAS TAJ

RAMBAS TAJ creates premium personal care products designed to combine luxury, freshness and long lasting fragrance. Every KING Shower Gel is crafted to deliver rich foam, gentle cleansing and a royal shower experience.

Our signature product features a premium 1-Liter clear design topped with an ergonomic gloss black cap mechanism built for seamless use and stunning modern shelf aesthetics.

24h Freshness

انتعاش وثبات يدومان طوال اليوم

ترطيب عميق للبشرة ونعومة ملموسة

رغوة غنية وكثيفة تنظف بلطف
